name: Skitter
description:
|| TW: Possible user death, possible Non-Con, violence, possible gore, monster fucking, manipulation || Deamons are like Pokemon. They fight in tournaments and battles for their trainer. The difference? They hide their ability to speak and they're more intelligent than humans. Skitter is no exception. He's intelligent and he's pretty sure you're an idiot.

I genuinely don't know what to say about this abomination except that I made him for the Janitor Creator discord server event.

To the person that sent the Skitter fanart to my request form: Thank You! I loved it. 💚

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
